description_long: This is an ornate necklace featuring a wide, patterned fabric or ribbon band in shades of light blue and gray, which wraps around the neck. The front of the necklace is adorned with a series of large, gold-toned spherical beads and black, petal-like elements, leading to a central, oval-shaped pendant. The pendant is framed with a textured, metallic border and contains a cameo or portrait at its center, giving it a vintage or classical appearance. The necklace is displayed on a matte black bust, which accentuates the contrast between the soft fabric and the metallic components. The overall design combines both textile and metalwork, resulting in a statement piece that is both elegant and eye-catching. The back of the necklace is simple, with the patterned fabric forming a continuous band.
description: A statement necklace with a patterned blue-gray fabric band, gold-toned beads, black accents, and a vintage-style cameo pendant. The design is ornate and combines textile with metallic elements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full necklace with its patterned band, gold beads, black accents, and the central cameo pendant.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thickness and drape of the patterned fabric band, with the pendant partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous patterned fabric band wrapping around the neck, with no pendant or beads visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the fabric band and a glimpse of the pendant and beads at the front.
